news.title: Taiwan prosecutors detain Super Micro employees over chip exports
news.summary: Investing.com -- Taiwanese prosecutors detained two Super Micro Computer Inc. employees on Wednesday following a raid of the company's local offices earlier this week over alleged shipments of Nvidia Corp. chips to China, according to a Bloomberg report early Wednesday.

news.title: Bitcoin and ethereum prices today, Wednesday, July 1: Bitcoin's worst month since June '22
news.summary: Bitcoin opened at $58,549.86 on Wednesday, down 2.6% from Tuesday's open. The price of bitcoin was $58,439.99 as of 8:27 a.m. ET this morning. Ethereum opened at $1,569.74 on Wednesday, down 2.5% compared to Tuesday's opening price. Ethereum prices this morning shifted to $1,568.26 as of 8:27 a.m. ET.

news.title: Citi cuts Strategy target as Bitcoin forecast revised lower
news.summary: Investing.com -- Citi cut its price target on Strategy Inc. to $136 from $260 in a note Wednesday, while maintaining its Buy rating and High Risk designation, after revising its 12-month Bitcoin forecast 27% lower to approximately $81,800.

news.title: Electric Vehicles Today - Advancing Grid Resilience With Vehicle-To-Grid Technology
news.summary: The Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) market is poised for substantial growth as electric vehicles (EVs) increasingly integrate with renewable energy systems, enhancing grid stability and energy management. Recent advancements in bidirectional charging technology allow EVs to store and supply energy, contributing to grid resilience during peak demand periods. This growth is fueled by government incentives and the expanding adoption of battery electric vehicles (BEVs), particularly in Asia, where strong...

news.title: Trump discloses over $1.4 billion in crypto income in 2025 filing
news.summary: For publicly traded crypto-linked funds, the disclosure underscores both the scale of Trump’s personal stake in the digital-asset market and the policy leverage that stake implies. Grayscale Bitcoin Trust ETF (NYSE: GBTC) was quoted at $45.52 in pre-market trading Wednesday, down 2.67% and near its 52-week low of $44.98, illustrating the gap between income figures booked at higher crypto valuations in 2025 and where the market stands today.

news.title: Silver prices today, Wednesday, July 1, 2026: Silver remains below $60
news.summary: Silver September (SI=F) futures opened at $59.25 today, down 1.1% compared to yesterday's opening price. The price of silver has been steady this morning, reaching $59.47 as of 8:05 a.m. ET.
